MAM policies for iOS and Android — data transfer restrictions, PIN requirements, encryption
Entra ID app registrations — permissions, redirect URIs, sign-in audience, credential expiry
Security Defaults, guest invite settings, SSPR, auth method configuration, admin consent

sample.description: Teams channels policies — private/shared channel governance posture
Device compliance policies — encryption, password, OS version, threat protection requirements
Entra ID Conditional Access policies — conditions, assignments, grant and session controls. Requires Entra ID P1 or P2

BitLocker policies — encryption enabled, method (AES-256/AES-128), recovery key escrow to Entra ID
Windows Firewall policies — domain, private and public profile enabled state, inbound/outbound default actions
Entra ID security and M365 groups — settings, visibility, dynamic rules
Mail flow connectors (mail routing) — best-effort via Microsoft Graph endpoints when configured.
Mailbox security settings and forwarding indicators — mailbox settings can be restored; rules are monitored for drift
